name: lung screening CT — Lung-RADS 4A with new nodule, size discrepancy

report.indication: Annual low-dose CT lung cancer screening.
report.technique: Low-dose non-contrast CT of the chest with 1 mm reconstructions.
report.findings: Lungs: 8 mm solid nodule in the right upper lobe, new since prior. No additional nodules. No adenopathy. No pleural effusion.
report.impression:
1. New 12 mm right upper lobe solid nodule.
2. Lung-RADS 4A.
